datasetName: J.P. Morgan Asset Management 2026 Long-Term Capital Market Assumptions
section: 2026 estimates and correlations | U.S. dollar assumptions
notes: This repository stores structured assumptions derived from the source report without redistributing the report PDFs.
Returns and volatilities are sourced from the report's U.S. dollar assumption matrix.
Correlation coverage includes the full U.S. dollar triangular matrix reconstructed from the source report PDF provided by the user.
